elegant.name: Elegant / Refined-Sophisticated
elegant.psychologicalEffect: Quality, refinement, sophistication, attention to detail

heritage.name: Heritage / Traditional-Premium
heritage.psychologicalEffect: Legacy, trust, tradition, prestige, established excellence

$personalityDecisionFramework.step1: Identify your primary audience (technical, business, consumer, wellness, creative, luxury)
$personalityDecisionFramework.step3: Consider industry norms and price point

$mobileFirstPrinciple.description: All components default to mobile sizes, with desktop overrides at lg: breakpoint (1024px)
$mobileFirstPrinciple.critical: NEVER use font sizes below 16px for body text on mobile (prevents iOS Safari zoom)

fontSizeMinimum.mobile: 16px absolute minimum for body text - CRITICAL for iOS Safari

linkAccessibility.underlineDefault: Underline by default or provide 3:1 contrast difference
linkAccessibility.focusVisible: 2px outline with 3:1 contrast for keyboard navigation

$responsiveTypography.mobile: Use smaller sizes (sm/md) - preserve readability on small screens
$responsiveTypography.desktop: Use larger sizes (lg/xl) - take advantage of screen space
$responsiveTypography.fluidScaling: Consider clamp() for smooth scaling between breakpoints

$semanticMarkup.headings: Always use proper heading hierarchy (h1→h2→h3, never skip levels)
$semanticMarkup.emphasis: Use <strong> for semantic importance, not just bold styling
$semanticMarkup.links: Must be understandable out of context (avoid 'click here')
$semanticMarkup.lists: Use <ul>/<ol> for lists, never just styled <div> elements
$semanticMarkup.quotes: Use <blockquote> for quotes with <cite> for attribution

$usageGuidelines.heading: Page/section titles with proper hierarchy (h1→h2→h3→h4→h5→h6)
$usageGuidelines.body: Primary text content - paragraphs, descriptions, explanations
$usageGuidelines.label: Form labels, tags, badges, metadata, identifiers (often uppercase)
$usageGuidelines.link: Clickable navigation - inline (underlined), standalone (CTA), navigation (no decoration)
$usageGuidelines.overline: Eyebrows/kickers above headings for context/category (always uppercase)
$usageGuidelines.quote: Testimonials, blockquotes with attribution and detail text
$usageGuidelines.button: Text inside interactive buttons - always use leading-none
